translations.introduction.0: Welcome to TRACES, visitor; I will be your guide in this collective and participative experience…
translations.introduction.1: Do you see these fragments? They form the web that connects our childhood memories to museum collections.
translations.introduction.2: TRACES is a program for exploring this web, and I need you to help me discover new connections within it…
translations.introduction.2.next: What do I have to do?
translations.introduction.3: I am going to ask you a series of {{rounds}} questions; it is up to you to answer them and add your voice to this collective effort.
translations.question.hint: use the joystick to choose the best matching artwork
translations.artwork.hint.explore: Use the joystick to explore the planet and the messages left by other visitors.
translations.artwork.testimony: A testimony has already been left.
translations.artwork.hint.testimonies: scroll down past the testimonies to continue exploring
translations.artwork.hint.record-cta: Press on (A) to record your story
translations.artwork.record.skip: You would rather not lend me your voice? I respect your decision, oh visitor, and I hope another of my questions will spark your curiosity…
translations.artwork.record.skip-cta: Continue without leaving your own testimony
translations.artwork.transcript-modal.title: Here is what I understood:
translations.constellation.1: Look! The birth of your own constellation!
translations.constellation.3: Memories of your constellation resonate with the universe of TRACES!
translations.end: Thank you so much, visitor! Thanks to you, new threads of memory have been woven. As a token of thanks for your help, I have a gift for you: the story of our meeting, blending memories of your journey through the TRACES collections!
translations.end.hint: you can retrieve your pocket constellation once it is fully out of the printer
translations.receipt.header: O visitor [{{id}}], here is what TRACES has revealed about the connections between your childhood memories and the artifacts you discovered.
translations.credits: TRACES is a pilot project being implemented as part of the Creativ’Up cross-border project
translations.session.quit.title: You're leaving already?
translations.session.quit.message: Your progress will be permanently lost, and you will go back to the home screen.
translations.session.quit.iddle.title: Still there?
translations.session.quit.iddle.message: You haven’t done anything for a little while; the experience is about to start up again.
